plugins.name: amir_system
plugins.description: User-scope core: project lifecycle (create/onboard/orchestrate/inspect/manage), Graphify wrappers, Asana + Playwright MCP, system rules. Available before any project exists.

plugins.name: amir_project
plugins.description: Project-scope component groups (harness, cloud, security, network, dev tooling, evaluation). Never auto-enabled; installed per project or rendered as a manifest-selected subset.
